title: JukeBoxPlus
description: 🎵 Spotify-like music overlay for Minecraft! See what's playing with a beautiful HUD - disc names, artists, progress bar, and history. Never wonder "what's this song?" again!
body:
<center>

# Jukebox Plus

[![Fabric API](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fabric%20API-Required-blue?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
[![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.4-green?style=for-the-badge&logo=minecraft)](https://minecraft.net)
[![Client Side](https://img.shields.io/badge/Side-Client%20Only-orange?style=for-the-badge)](/)

</center>

---

## Description

**Jukebox Plus** is a sleek and interactive music player mod that brings the joy of music to your Minecraft world! With **Jukebox Plus**, you can enjoy a wide range of music types (discs, ambient, Nether, and more) directly from within the game through an easy-to-use, animated GUI.

---

## Features

<center>

| Feature | Description |
|:---:|:---|
| **Interactive GUI** | Smooth animations and a modern interface for all your music needs |
| **Multiple Categories** | Choose from categories like Discs, Ambient, Nether, and more |
| **Shuffle & Repeat** | Control the playback with shuffle and repeat options |
| **Track Progress** | Visual progress bar to see the track's progress in real time |
| **Now Playing** | Always see what's currently playing with detailed track info |
| **Volume Control** | Adjust the volume directly from the interface |
| **Click to Play** | Easily click to play, pause, skip, or replay songs |
| **Full Track Info** | Title, artist, and duration displayed for every track |
| **Music List** | Browse through your music library with a scrollable list |

</center>

---

## Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) for **1.21.4**
2. Install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
3. Download **Jukebox Plus** and place it in your `mods/` folder
4. Launch the game and press **H** to open the music player!
